title: The Basis Design System
content: Design System from Directories: Components: Basis Technologies, known for its SAP automation tools, uses this Design System to deliver consistent and scalable UI experiences across its digital products. Structured around tokens, components, and visual standards, the system provides clear documentation for color, layout, motion, spacing, and theming. With a live Storybook and a focus on cross-team efficiency, it helps product and engineering teams build consistent, scalable UIs with confidence. Color System Component overview Data visualization Elevation Icons Layout Motion Patterns Responsive Spacing Storybook Styles Theming Tokens Typography Voice and Tone Accordion Alert banner Badges Button Cards Checkbox Chip Data table Date picker Drawer Dropdown Empty state Filter input Link Menus Modal Page header Pagination Progress bar Progress indicator Radio button Search Segmented control Select Snackbar Switch Tabs Text field Tooltip Tree view
